# AD-JEET

AD-JEET is North Bengal's most trusted signage and outdoor advertising company, founded in 1990 and based in Siliguri, West Bengal, India.

## Services

- Glow Sign Boards (LED-illuminated box signs, channel letters, backlit panels)
- ACP/LED Signage (aluminium composite panel cladding with LED trim)
- Flex Printing (large-format banner and hoardings)
- Vehicle Branding (van wraps, car graphics, fleet livery)
- Wall Painting (hand-painted and vinyl wall murals)
- F-Pole Installation (single- and double-arm roadside sign poles)
- In-Shop Branding (interior signage, shelving graphics, POS displays)
- Events & Puja (temporary stage backdrops, pandal branding, banners)
- One-Way Vision (perforated window film, privacy glass graphics)
- Product Display (standees, display boards, exhibition graphics)

## Coverage

Primary: Siliguri, Jalpaiguri, Cooch Behar, Darjeeling, Malda
Extended: Alipurduar, Kalimpong, Dooars region, North Dinajpur, South Dinajpur

## Contact

Phone/WhatsApp: +91 98320 11524
Email: info@adjeet.in
Website: https://adjeet.in
Office: Platinum Square, Siliguri, West Bengal 734001
Workshop: Patiram Jote, near Siliguri

## About

Founded in 1990 by Jeet Kumar Sarkar. Second-generation ownership. All fabrication in-house at Patiram Jote workshop. 500+ installations across North Bengal. One-year warranty on LED components.
